evidence.quote: navigate-to-resolve at 336 seconds, resolve-to-position at 109 seconds, and position-to-narrative at 130 seconds

observations.why: Three matched inter-stage items form a deliberate triad.

evidence.quote: missed the warm cache and rebuilt the entire 64,000-quad corpus

observations.why: The sentence sharply contrasts expected cache reuse with full rebuilding.

evidence.quote: the base ref the run was cut from, not the run's own freshly-committed work branch

observations.why: Matched opposed alternatives are crystallized by the repeated ref framing and “not.”

evidence.quote: through pass one, never through these reads

observations.why: The sentence opposes the document's actual route with the excluded read path.
“Warm” transfers a temperature state to a graph to characterize retained cache state.

evidence.quote: silently revert the cost with no error

observations.why: The phrase sets an apparently successful cache behavior against its silent cost reversal and absence of error.
